prompt: Edit image 1 by adding the lunar rover from image 2 onto the surface, making it appear parked near the flag. Incorporate the satellite from image 3 into the dark sky above, depicted orbiting the moon. Ensure photorealistic integration of these elements into the lunar landscape.

objects: lunar rover parked near the flag
